Class
Description

Controller for the active orders view.
CartController
Controller for the shopping cart view.
CustomizationController
Controller for the item customization panel.
DatabaseManager
Manages the PostgreSQL database connection for the cashier application.
Main
Entry point for the Cashier JavaFX application.
MainController
Main navigation controller for the cashier application.
MenuController
Controller for the menu view.
MenuItem
Represents a menu item from the database.
